docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PAUL AN INDIVIDUAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUA, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PAUL AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1500 OCEAN AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO CA 94112 $12,988.56 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,988.56, LEASE FORFEITED, ; MONEY JUDGMENT ONLY. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT OF STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR FULL DETAILS.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CHUA, ELIZABETH
REMOVED FROM UD COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR APR-18-2016 - CASE SETTLED. (501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUA, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PAUL AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PAUL AN INDIVIDUAL
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUA, ELIZABETH
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON AUG-14-2025.
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUA, ELIZABETH HEARING SET FOR APR-11-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PAUL AN INDIVIDUAL

UD COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-11-2016 CONTINUED TO APR-18-2016 AT 9:00 AM IN 501 FOR SETTLEMENT PROTECTIVE DATE PER REQUEST OF BOTH COUNSEL HEREBRT HITTIG AND MARC BENDER. BOTH WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ; EXHIBIT A. (SEE SCANNED STIPULATION FOR DETAILS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUA, ELIZABETH ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PAUL AN INDIVIDUAL
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ; STIPULATION SIGNED BY COUNSEL, EXHIBIT B. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUA, ELIZABETH ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, PAUL AN INDIVIDUAL
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR HITTIG, HERBERT CHRISTOPHER AS ATTORNEY FOR CHUA, ELIZABETH
